method: Rendered the rebuilt 21-page PDF with pdftoppm after the uncertainty-framing and supplemental 3D-trajectory update. Visually inspected the changed spectral table page, causal capture page, cross-family and held-out detector text pages, appendix pages, the new 3D trajectory figure, and the shifted held-out detector figure. The uncertainty language is legible, the new 3D figure is readable, and no clipping, overlap, duplicate URL, or alignment defects were observed.
